sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Topa phat un, na khempeuh a piangsak i Kumpipa,
Ke’n ka phat ding ka nuntakna hong hon,
Tua thu zate’n A biakinn lam hong zuan un,

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Topa phat un, na khempeuh lamdang a hong uk Mangpa,
kem, hong liah a, hong vak pa;
Ka theizo hi, Topa vaihawmna bangin,

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Topa phat un, keimah hong kem, ka ma hong vangsak pa,
Hong itna tawh, kei bang lel lawmin hong nei,
Kei ading hihlah nei ngei kei.
